title: helianthus subtuberosus var. rydbergii
intro: Helianthus subtuberosus var. rydbergii, also known as a type of sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus subtuberosus var. rydbergii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
